title: Planning Graph Node Config
description: Shared schema for Planning Graph node config files (calculator, planner, shim) used across SSA.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference used by tooling. Not interpreted by SSA runtime.

nodeKey.description: Stable key for the node, used as a graph identifier (e.g. 'calendar.BiblicalOfferingCalculator').

kind.description: The type of node within the planning graph.

version.description: Monotonic version for this node config. Bump on breaking changes.

name.description: Human-friendly display name for the node.

description.description: Longer description of what this node calculates or plans.

tags.description: Freeform tags used for discovery, filtering, and docs.

inputKeys.description: Fully-qualified keys this node consumes from other nodes or calculators.

outputKeys.description: Fully-qualified keys this node produces for downstream consumers.

feedsInto.description: Optional list of node keys that this node commonly connects to in the Planning Graph.

ui.description: UI/UX hints for rendering this node inside SSA tooling.

label.description: Short label used in menus and node diagrams.

icon.description: Icon name or key for the node.

priority.description: Sort priority for UI lists (higher = more prominent).

docsPath.description: Relative path to README or docs for this node.

behavior.description: Non-functional behavior hints for orchestration and caching.

isDeterministic.description: Whether the node produces the same output for the same input.

canCache.description: Whether SSA is allowed to cache outputs keyed by inputs.

sensitivity.description: Data sensitivity classification for Hub export and sharing.

conflictsWith.description: Optional list of node keys this node conflicts with (mutually exclusive scenarios).

dependsOnFreshness.description: Optional list of input keys that should be treated as freshness-sensitive (e.g. inventory, herd snapshot).
